title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rhenus Logistics India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rhenus Logistics India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
